en_title: Grand Theft Auto 6 Preorders Are Live
subtitle: 盒里有码无盘
opus_summary: 《GTA6》预购开启，标准版79.99美元(约合人民币545元)(约合545元)，终极版99.99美元(约合人民币681元)(约合681元)；实体版仅下载码。

paragraphs.en: Grand Theft Auto 6 , the most anticipated game of the year and possibly of all time, is now officially up for preorder (see here) for both its Standard Edition on PS5 and Xbox , priced at $79.99, and Ultimate Edition, priced at $99.99.
paragraphs.cn: 《GTA6》作为今年甚至可能是史上最受期待的游戏，现已正式开启预购，提供PS5和XBOX标准版，售价79.99美元(约合人民币545元)，以及终极版，售价99.99美元(约合人民币681元)。

paragraphs.en: We've gathered all the information you might need in order to make an informed purchase, along with links to where you can preorder the game today.
paragraphs.cn: 我们整理了你在做出购买决定前可能需要的全部信息，并附上了今天即可预购的链接。

paragraphs.en: Update: Amazon has already 'sold out' of its initial preorder allocation. Walmart and Target still have preorders for the standard edition available. For now, the Ultimate Edition is only live via PlayStation and Xbox's digital storefronts. More to follow.
paragraphs.cn: 更新：亚马逊的初始预购配额已经「售罄」。沃尔玛和Target仍有标准版预购。目前终极版仅可通过PlayStation和XBOX数字商城购买。后续会有更多消息。

paragraphs.en: Priced from $79.99 , preorders for "physical" copies of Grand Theft Auto 6 go live today — though you'll only get a box containing a digital download code .
paragraphs.cn: 《GTA6》「实体」版预购今日开启，起售价79.99美元(约合人民币545元)——但你拿到的只会是一个装有数字下载码的盒子。

paragraphs.en: Physical copies will actually be available from November 12, ahead of the game's full launch on November 19.
paragraphs.cn: 实体版实际上将于11月12日开始供货，早于游戏11月19日的正式发售。

paragraphs.en: This earlier date is also when GTA 6 pre-loading will become available , allowing anyone with a physical copy or digital pre-order to get the game downloading.
paragraphs.cn: 这个更早的日期也是《GTA6》开启预载的时间，届时持有实体版或数字预购的玩家都可以预先下载游戏。

paragraphs.en: Note that some retailers like Amazon won't charge you for your purchase until it eventually ships, so if you're looking to save up over the second half of the year, picking up a physical copy is likely your best bet.
paragraphs.cn: 需要注意的是，像亚马逊这样的零售商在商品实际发货前不会扣款，所以如果你想下半年慢慢攒钱，入手实体版很可能是最稳妥的选择。

paragraphs.en: The Vintage Vice City Pack is included with all digital purchases of GTA 6 made prior to November 20, 2026, and with preorders of the physical version of GTA 6 while supplies last.
paragraphs.cn: Vintage Vice City Pack会随所有在2026年11月20日前购买的《GTA6》数字版发放，预购实体版《GTA6》也可获得，数量有限，送完即止。

paragraphs.en: Jason: An effortlessly chic linen suit in vintage pastel, complemented by the cut and coif of the decade of decadence.
paragraphs.cn: Jason：一身复古柔和色调的亚麻西装，潇洒随性，发型和剪裁都带着那个纸醉金迷年代的韵味。

paragraphs.en: Lucia: The world is yours in a red sequin mini dress and curls.
paragraphs.cn: Lucia：红色亮片迷你连衣裙搭配卷发，世界尽在掌握。

paragraphs.en: Grand Theft Auto 6's Ultimate Edition adds exclusive vehicles, weapon variants, customization options, side activities, and a large collection of cosmetic content for both protagonists. It costs $100 and is available as a digital or physical purchase.
paragraphs.cn: 《GTA6》终极版追加了独占载具、武器变体、自定义选项、附加活动，以及大量两位主角的装饰品内容。售价100美元(约合人民币681元)，提供数字版和实体版。

paragraphs.en: The obvious counterpoint to the idea of "physically owning" GTA 6 takes a bit of a hit when you remember there's no disc in the box, just a download code .
paragraphs.cn: 然而，一想到实体盒里根本没有光盘，只有一张下载码，「真正拥有」《GTA6》的念头就难免要打折扣了。

paragraphs.en: While this certainly isn't ideal , and definitely won't satify most physical media advocates, myself included, I can absolutely still see people wanting to own the box as a collector's item, a memento, or simply a marker of gaming history.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然这显然不是理想做法，也肯定无法让大多数实体媒体支持者满意——包括我自己——但我完全能想象有人仍想拥有这个盒子，作为收藏品、纪念物，或仅仅是游戏历史的见证。

paragraphs.en: And there's no shame in that. Let's be honest, this is probably going to be the biggest game launch of all time. I'll be treating it as such, and you should too. (Still, it also would've been nice if they included a disc as well).
paragraphs.cn: 这一点也不丢人。说实话，这很可能会是有史以来最大的游戏发布。我会这样看待它，你也应该如此。（不过，要是他们能附带一张光盘就更好了。）

paragraphs.en: My second reason is a slightly more economic one. How sensible of me.
paragraphs.cn: 我的第二个理由稍微更经济一些。我可真是精打细算。

paragraphs.en: The global economy is a bit dicey right now (potentially understatement of the year, I know). Now, that's not going to stop millions of people buying GTA 6, but an $80 price tag is definitely enough to make at least some of us hesitate. At least, that's what Reddit commenters keep telling me, and they're famously the most intelligent among us.
paragraphs.cn: 全球经济目前有点不妙（我知道这可能是今年最轻描淡写的说法了）。但这并不会阻止数百万人购买《GTA6》，不过80美元(约合人民币545元)的标价肯定足以让至少一部分人犹豫。至少Reddit上的评论者们一直这么告诉我，而且他们可是公认的我们之中最聪明的人。

paragraphs.en: For anyone who's not thrilled about paying $80 today for a digital copy, and then waiting several months to actually play the game (or simply doesn't have the cash available right now) a physical preorder through retailers like Amazon, Walmart, or Best Buy could make more sense.
paragraphs.cn: 对于不想现在为数字版支付80美元(约合人民币545元)然后等上几个月才能实际玩游戏（或者现在手头没那么多现金）的人来说，通过亚马逊、沃尔玛或百思买等零售商进行实体预购可能更合理。

paragraphs.en: Thanks to their preorder guarantees, these retailers won't charge you until your order ships . So if you're planning to spread the cost over the second half of the year, a physical preorder may actually be the smarter option.
paragraphs.cn: 得益于这些零售商的预购保证，它们不会在你的订单发货前扣款。所以如果你打算把这笔开销分摊到今年下半年，实体预购可能是更聪明的选择。

paragraphs.en: Still, at the end of the day, this is entirely subjective. Just do whatever is best for you. Want to buy digitally? Go for it. Fancy a physical copy to delay the cost, or as a collector's item? Crack on!
paragraphs.cn: 不过说到底，这完全因人而异。挑最适合自己的方式就行。想买数字版？选它就完了。想要实体版，要么为了延后付款，要么作为收藏品？尽管上！

paragraphs.en: A digital preorder also gets you a free month of GTA+, with Rockstar referencing GTA Online:
paragraphs.cn: 预购数字版还能免费获得一个月的GTA+会员，Rockstar在提到《GTA Online》时表示：

paragraphs.en: "Experience the dynamic blockbuster GTA Online now with the best way to get the most out of its ever-evolving world. Pre-order any edition of Grand Theft Auto VI on the PlayStation Store or Microsoft Store and get one free month of GTA+ — featuring a recurring monthly GTA$500,000 deposit into your GTA Online character's bank account, access to special Shark Cards with 15% bonus GTA$, access to free and discounted GTA Online vehicles, a rotating selection of classic Rockstar Games titles and other featured games in the GTA+ Games Library, and much more."
paragraphs.cn: 「现在就来体验不断演变的精彩《GTA Online》，这是充分享受其动态世界的最佳方式。在PlayStation Store或微软商店预购任意版本《GTA6》，即可获赠一个月GTA+会员——每月定期向你在《GTA Online》角色的银行账户存入50万GTA游戏币，可获得含15%额外GTA游戏币奖励的特殊鲨鱼卡，可免费使用或折扣购买《GTA Online》载具，还能畅玩GTA+游戏库中轮换的精选经典Rockstar游戏及其他特色游戏，福利远不止于此。」

paragraphs.en: It's worth noting that this auto-renews, so if you do redeem the free month of GTA+ - we'd advice turning that off at your nearest opportunity.
paragraphs.cn: 需要注意，该服务会自动续费，因此如果你兑换了免费一个月的GTA+，我们建议尽早关闭自动续费。

paragraphs.en: Grand Theft Auto 6 is set in Leonida , the GTA-universe version of Florida, where Vice City is located. Based on the trailers, it looks like you'll spend plenty of time in Vice City, but this isn't the 1980s version of the city from the 2002 game .
paragraphs.cn: 《GTA6》的故事发生在列奥尼达——也就是《GTA》世界观下的佛罗里达，罪恶都市就坐落于此。根据预告片来看，你会在罪恶都市里度过大量时间，但这并非源自2002年那款游戏中的80年代版本城市。

paragraphs.en: GTA 6 is set in the modern day, and the scope of the game expands well beyond the bounds of the urban area. In fact, it might represent the entire state. You'll visit the Leonida Keys, the Grassrivers marshland, Mount Kalaga National Park, among other locations .
paragraphs.cn: 《GTA6》设定在现代，而游戏的地域范围远超城市边界。事实上，它可能涵盖了整个州。你将能造访列奥尼达群岛、格拉里弗斯沼泽、卡拉加山国家公园等多处地点。

paragraphs.en: The game centers on outlaws in love, Lucia Caminos and Jason Duval, who get roped into a wide-ranging criminal conspiracy. Much of what we know about the game comes from the trailers , which Rockstar has been oh-so gradually dropping onto the internet once a year since 2023.
paragraphs.cn: 游戏以一对亡命情侣Lucia Caminos和Jason Duval为中心，他们卷入了一场大规模的犯罪阴谋。我们对这款游戏的了解大多来自预告片，Rockstar从2023年起，每年在网上放出一支预告片，速度慢得惊人。

paragraphs.en: Moving backwards in time, the second trailer came out on May 6, 2025.
paragraphs.cn: 倒回去看，第二支预告片于2025年5月6日发布。

paragraphs.en: This trailer, set to The Pointer Sisters’ song “Hot Together,” zeroes in on protagonist Jason Duval as he goes about his day, doing house work, collecting rent checks for a relative, and picking up his girlfriend, Lucia Caminos, when she’s released from prison. They seem to have a healthy, loving relationship, but they can’t seem to stop doing crimes, Bonnie and Clyde-style.
paragraphs.cn: 这支预告片以Pointer Sisters的歌曲《Hot Together》为背景，聚焦主角Jason Duval的日常：做家务、帮亲戚收租、接女友Lucia Caminos出狱。他们看起来感情深厚，关系健康，但仿若邦妮和克莱德，就是停不下来犯罪。

paragraphs.en: According to the trailer’s description, “when an easy score goes wrong, they find themselves on the darkest side of the sunniest place in America, in the middle of a criminal conspiracy stretching across the state of Leonida — forced to rely on each other more than ever if they want to make it out alive.“
paragraphs.cn: 根据预告片描述：「当一次轻松的行动出了岔子，他们发现自己身陷美国阳光最明媚之地的至暗面，卷入一场横跨Leonida全州的犯罪阴谋——若想活着脱身，他们将不得不比以往任何时候都更依赖彼此。」

paragraphs.en: Rockstar released the first trailer on December 4, 2023. Set to the Tom Petty song “Love Is a Long Road,” it shows off the Florida – er, Leonida – setting, with beaches, cities, and swamp areas. It also introduces the dual protagonists, Lucia and Jason.
paragraphs.cn: Rockstar在2023年12月4日发布了第一支预告片。配乐是Tom Petty的歌曲《Love Is a Long Road》，展示了佛罗里达——呃，Leonida——的场景，有海滩、城市和沼泽。同时介绍了双主角Lucia和Jason。

paragraphs.en: Note that this trailer says the game is coming in 2025, but it was later delayed until May 2026 , and then, even later, delayed again to its current release date of November 19, 2026.
paragraphs.cn: 注意，这支预告片称游戏将于2025年推出，但后来延期至2026年5月，再之后又延期至目前的2026年11月19日。

paragraphs.en: Robert Anderson is IGN's Senior Commerce Editor and resident deals expert on games, collectibles, trading card games, and more. You can follow him .
paragraphs.cn: Robert Anderson是IGN的高级电商编辑，也是游戏、收藏品、集换式卡牌游戏等领域的常驻优惠专家。

paragraphs.en: This article contains contributions by Chris Reed.
paragraphs.cn: 本文包含Chris Reed的贡献。
